title: Binlog Event Capture and Dispatch
activity_flow: START: Kafka Connect calls BaseSourceTask.start(props)
BaseSourceTask.start() → calls doStart() → builds ChangeEventSourceCoordinator
[Validation] BinlogSourceTask.validateBinlogConfiguration(snapshotter, connection) → checks isBinlogFormatRow() and isBinlogRowImageFull()
[Validation] BinlogSourceTask.validateSnapshotFeasibility(snapshotter, offsetContext, connection) → checks earliestBinlogFilename()
BinlogStreamingChangeEventSource constructed: configures BinaryLogClient (SSL, serverId, keepalive, heartbeat, netTimeout, eventDeserializer)
BinlogStreamingChangeEventSource.execute(context, partition, offsetContext) entered
[Setup] Register event handlers for all EventType entries: STOP, HEARTBEAT, INCIDENT, ROTATE, TABLE_MAP, QUERY, TRANSACTION_PAYLOAD, WRITE_ROWS, UPDATE_ROWS, DELETE_ROWS, VIEW_CHANGE, XA_PREPARE, XID
[Conditional] If skippedOperations contains CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE → skip registering corresponding handler
[Conditional] If isSqlQueryIncluded → register ROWS_QUERY or ANNOTATE_ROWS handler → handleRecordingQuery()
[Setup] If bufferSize == 0 → listener = (event) -> handleEvent(); else wrap in EventBuffer
[Setup] Register BinaryLogClient event listener, lifecycle listener (ReaderThreadLifecycleListener), heartbeat logger
[GTID branch] If isGtidModeEnabled && shouldRecoverUsingGtid() → register GTID handler, compute filteredGtidSet from server, set client.setGtidSet()
[Non-GTID branch] else → client.setBinlogFilename() + setBinlogPosition() from offsetContext
[Init] initialEventsToSkip = offsetContext.eventsToSkipUponRestart(); startingRowNumber = offsetContext.rowsToSkipUponRestart()
client.connect(timeout) — BinaryLogClient connects to DB and starts background binlog reader thread
LOOP: context.isRunning() → Thread.sleep(100), waitWhenStreamingPaused(context)
--- EVENT RECEIVED (BinaryLogClient callback thread) ---
handleEvent(partition, offsetContext, context, event) invoked
[Event pre-processing] offsetContext.setBinlogServerId(serverId); if ROTATE → offsetContext.setBinlogStartPoint(); else offsetContext.setEventPosition(pos, len)
[Pause check] waitWhenStreamingPaused(context) — blocks if snapshotting in progress
[Dispatch] eventHandlers.get(eventType).accept(event) — routes to specific handler
[Post-dispatch] eventDispatcher.dispatchHeartbeatEvent(partition, offsetContext)
[Post-dispatch] offsetContext.completeEvent(); update lastOffset
[Skip logic] if skipEvent → decrement initialEventsToSkip; skipEvent = (initialEventsToSkip > 0)
--- HANDLER BRANCHES ---
ROTATE handler → handleRotateLogsEvent() → offsetContext.setBinlogStartPoint(filename, pos); clear tableMapCache
TABLE_MAP handler → handleUpdateTableMetadata() → schema.getTableId(); update table metadata in schema
QUERY handler → handleQueryEvent() → if 'BEGIN' → handleTransactionBegin() → offsetContext.startNextTransaction(); eventDispatcher.dispatchTransactionStartedEvent()
QUERY handler → if 'COMMIT' → handleTransactionCompletion() → eventDispatcher.dispatchTransactionCommittedEvent()
QUERY handler → if DDL → eventDispatcher.dispatchSchemaChangeEvent()
GTID handler → handleGtidEvent() → offsetContext update; filter by gtidDmlSourceFilter; set ignoreDmlEventByGtidSource
WRITE_ROWS handler → handleInsert() → handleChange(..., CREATE, WriteRowsEventData) → for each row: BinlogChangeRecordEmitter(CREATE) → eventDispatcher.dispatchDataChangeEvent()
UPDATE_ROWS handler → handleUpdate() → handleChange(..., UPDATE, UpdateRowsEventData) → for each row: BinlogChangeRecordEmitter(UPDATE) → eventDispatcher.dispatchDataChangeEvent()
DELETE_ROWS handler → handleDelete() → handleChange(..., DELETE, DeleteRowsEventData) → for each row: BinlogChangeRecordEmitter(DELETE) → eventDispatcher.dispatchDataChangeEvent()
TRANSACTION_PAYLOAD handler → handleTransactionPayload() → decompress/iterate uncompressed events; call handleEvent() recursively for each
HEARTBEAT handler → handleServerHeartbeat() → metrics update
STOP handler → handleServerStop() → signal graceful stop
INCIDENT handler → handleServerIncident() → log/error
XID handler → handleTransactionCompletion() → eventDispatcher.dispatchTransactionCommittedEvent()
--- handleChange() internal flow ---
[Guard] if skipEvent → log and return
[Guard] if ignoreDmlEventByGtidSource → log and return
[Guard] if tableId == null or schema.schemaFor(tableId) == null → informAboutUnknownTableIfRequired()
for each row (from startingRowNumber): validate schema, offsetContext.setRowNumber(); offsetContext.event(tableId, timestamp); changeEmitter.emit(tableId, row)
changeEmitter calls eventDispatcher.dispatchDataChangeEvent(partition, tableId, BinlogChangeRecordEmitter)
offsetContext.changeEventCompleted(); startingRowNumber = 0
--- ON ERROR ---
RuntimeException → logStreamingSourceState(); errorHandler.setProducerThrowable(DebeziumException); eventHandlers.clear()
InterruptedException → Thread.interrupt(); eventHandlers.clear()
BinlogHeartbeatErrorHandler.onError(SQLException) → if SQLState 42000 or 3D000 → throw DebeziumException; else ignore
--- POLL path (Kafka Connect polling thread) ---
BaseSourceTask.poll() → startIfNeededAndPossible() → doPoll() → ChangeEventSourceCoordinator drains queue → returns List<SourceRecord>
--- NoTombStonesHandler (test/consumer integration) ---
DebeziumEngine calls NoTombStonesHandler.handleBatch(records, committer) → offer each record to BlockingQueue; committer.markProcessed(r)
NoTombStonesHandler.supportsTombstoneEvents() returns false → engine suppresses tombstone SourceRecords for DELETE events
STOP: context.isRunning() becomes false → exit main loop → client.disconnect()
key_conditions: isGtidModeEnabled && shouldRecoverUsingGtid() → use GTID-based binlog positioning vs file+pos
bufferSizeForStreamingChangeEventSource == 0 → direct handleEvent() vs EventBuffer buffering
skipEvent == true → skip DML rows (transaction restart recovery)
ignoreDmlEventByGtidSource == true → skip DML rows filtered by GTID source
tableId != null && schema.schemaFor(tableId) != null → only dispatch known tables
context.isPaused() → block streaming for incremental snapshot interleaving
NoTombStonesHandler.supportsTombstoneEvents() == false → suppress tombstone events on DELETE
key_relationships: BinlogSourceTask extends BaseSourceTask (abstract, extends Kafka SourceTask)
BinlogHeartbeatErrorHandler implements HeartbeatErrorHandler (inner static class of BinlogSourceTask)
BinlogChangeRecordEmitter wraps row data and operation for EventDispatcher
EventBuffer wraps handleEvent for backpressure-buffered processing
important_notes: BinlogStreamingChangeEventSource is the core event loop. It uses mysql-binlog-connector-java (BinaryLogClient) which runs in background threads. handleEvent() is the central dispatcher — routes by EventType enum to registered handlers. handleChange() is the DML row emitter — iterates rows, validates schema, emits per-row. GTID mode vs file+pos mode affects startup positioning. BinlogHeartbeatErrorHandler is a static inner class of BinlogSourceTask — handles heartbeat SQL errors for 42000 (DB access denied) and 3D000 (no DB selected). NoTombStonesHandler is a test-only DebeziumEngine.ChangeConsumer that suppresses tombstone events and queues records into a BlockingQueue for test assertion. BinlogSourceInfo tracks: currentGtid, currentBinlogFilename, currentBinlogPosition, currentRowNumber, serverId, sourceTime, threadId, currentQuery, tableIds, databaseName.
